title: Glacier Gauntlet
desc: Dodge falling ice blocks and catch crystals — learning about phase changes, latent heat, and why ice floats.

title: Orbit
desc: Reverse your orbital direction to grab gems and dodge hazards — exploring angular speed, circumference, and gravity.

title: Drop Stack 3D
desc: Stack 3D blocks with perfect timing — learning speed, acceleration, reaction time, and margin of error.

title: Sunset Glow
desc: Tap falling orbs before they hit the ground — discovering light scattering, gravity, and probability.

title: Nova Arc
desc: Thrust through gates and dodge hazards — mastering parabolic arcs, gravity, impulse, and projectile motion.
